@page-component-object/page.description: Page Component Object (PCO) — npm org landing package
@page-component-object/page.summary: npm org landing README for @page-component-object — lists all published packages. Install scoped packages like @page-component-object/react instead.

@page-component-object/core.description: PCO core types, App singleton, ObjectFactory, and runtime injection
@page-component-object/core.summary: Foundation package for the Page Component Object stack — shared types, the `App` singleton, `ObjectFactory`, and adapter runtime injection.

@page-component-object/queries.description: ComponentTestObject — Testing Library queries and primitive user interactions
@page-component-object/queries.summary: `ComponentTestObject` base class: RTL-style getters (`getByRole`, …) and element-centric primitives (`userClick`, `userType`, …).

@page-component-object/msw.description: MSW v2 API mock registry, ApiTestObject, and semantic API matchers
@page-component-object/msw.summary: HTTP boundary for PCO view tests — `ApiTestObject` route registration, mock sessions, and `@semantic-matchers` API spy matchers.

@page-component-object/react.description: BaseViewTestObject and BaseAppManager for React view tests
@page-component-object/react.summary: View-level test objects — `BaseViewTestObject` with `setupMockData()`, render helpers, and `BaseAppManager` test app shell.

@page-component-object/router-react.description: React Router v6/v7 test shell for PCO view tests
@page-component-object/router-react.summary: Router test utilities — `MemoryRouter`, `Routes`, and navigation wiring for behavioral view tests.

@page-component-object/preset-mui.description: Reusable MUI widget test objects for PCO
@page-component-object/preset-mui.summary: Composable MUI presets — Button, Select, Dialog, Snackbar, TimePicker, TableRow, and related widget test objects.

@page-component-object/adapter-vitest.description: Vitest lifecycle and user agent adapter for PCO
@page-component-object/adapter-vitest.summary: Vitest integration — `installPCOLifecycle`, `setupPCO()`, and semantic API matchers for MSW-backed view tests.

@page-component-object/adapter-jest.description: Jest lifecycle and user agent adapter for PCO
@page-component-object/adapter-jest.summary: Jest integration — parity with the Vitest adapter for MSW-backed behavioral view tests.

@page-component-object/adapter-storybook.description: Storybook play, MSW bridge, and PCO view loader
@page-component-object/adapter-storybook.summary: Storybook adapter — `createStoryPlay`, `storyParameters`, `pcoViewLoader`, and shared MSW handlers with node tests.

@page-component-object/adapter-cypress.description: Cypress E2E adapter — CypressComponentTestObject and PCOChainable
@page-component-object/adapter-cypress.summary: Cypress integration — `@testing-library/cypress` queries, getter reuse from shared test objects, and `PCOChainable` semantic actions. Experimental in 0.1.2.
